5: generate a blog post about AI trends. It starts by setting up the environment, loading
6: API keys from a .env file. The core of the application involves defining two agents: a

9: Two tasks are defined accordingly: one for researching the trends and another for

13: tasks, and a language model (specifically the "gemini-2.0-flash" model). The main
14: function executes this crew using the kickoff() method, orchestrating the
15: collaboration between the agents to produce the desired output. Finally, the code
16: prints the final result of the crew's execution, which is the generated blog post.
